jira.description: The login endpoint /api/auth/login returns HTTP 500 for all users since the deploy at 14:30 UTC.

github.title: CI pipeline failing on main branch
github.body: All CI runs on main branch are failing with exit code 1 on the test step. Blocking all deployments.

generic.subject: Disk usage at 95% on prod-db-01
generic.message: The production database server prod-db-01 has reached 95% disk utilization. Immediate action required to prevent data loss.
